title: Semarang, Central Java — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Semarang is a city in Central Java with a population of 1,653,000. Central Java’s capital and a historic port city with a rich Chinese-Indonesian heritage and culinary scene.
